title: [FIRRTL] Don't override instance names in the propagation
body:
```scala
circuit Foo:
  module System:
    input in:UInt<1>
    output out: UInt<1>
    out <= in
  module Foo:
    input in: UInt<1>
    output out: UInt<1>
    inst system of System
    system.in <= in
    node b = system.out
    out <= b 
```
The current output:
```
  System b (
    .in  (in),
    .out (out)
  );
```
Even though it's not specified well in the spec, instance names are sometimes used as public names. So the name propagation in FIRRTL folder should not overwrite the existing instance names.
